No
Reasoning: The patient's current visit record shows several serious comorbidities, including Angiodysplasia of stomach and duodenum with hemorrhage, acute posthemorrhagic anemia, Mitral valve insufficiency and aortic valve insufficiency, personal history of malignant neoplasm of large intestine, other chronic pulmonary heart diseases, esophageal reflux, coronary atherosclerosis, and essential hypertension. The patient is receiving various medications, including D5NS, Ampicillin Sodium, Midazolam HCl, Isotonic Sodium Chloride, Gentamicin, NS, LR, Fentanyl Citrate, Potassium Chloride, NS (Mini Bag Plus), Acetaminophen, Lorazepam, Magnesium Sulfate, Hydrochlorothiazide, Sucralfate, Atorvastatin, Pantoprazole, Clonazepam, Isosorbide Dinitrate, Atenolol, Magnesium Oxide, Spironolactone, Docusate Sodium, Vial, Pantoprazole Sodium, Sodium Chloride 0.9% Flush, Golytely, Fleet Phospho-Soda. The patient also underwent endoscopic control of gastric or duodenal bleeding and other endoscopy of small intestine, as well as transfusion of packed cells.
